info.name: Acronis Task Manager API
info.description:
Alerts Management API enables activation, inspection, and removal of alerts generated by Acronis Cyber Protection.

Tasks and Activities Management API enables inspection of tasks and activities performed by Acronis Cyber Protection.

Usage Guides  
[https://developer.acronis.com/doc/outbound/apis/api-library/tasks](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/outbound/apis/api-library/tasks)

Full References  
[https://developer.acronis.com/doc/alerts/v1/reference/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/alerts/v1/reference/)

[https://developer.acronis.com/doc/tasks/v2/reference/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/tasks/v2/reference/)

Blog Post  
[https://developer.acronis.com/blog/posts/some-technical-aspects-of-the-integration-of-ateras-powerful-psa-and-rmm-suite-with-acronis-cyber-cloud/](https://developer.acronis.com/blog/posts/some-technical-aspects-of-the-integration-of-ateras-powerful-psa-and-rmm-suite-with-acronis-cyber-cloud/)

Copyright © 2019-2024 Acronis International GmbH. This is distributed under MIT license.
